data.name: Unexpected Consequences
data.detailed_description:
Follow the story of a sophomore at Ocean City University with a tragic past. Three years after a close friend's unfortunate accident, followed shortly by the death of your parents, two new young women come into your life, triggering a chain of events that lead to you reconnecting with your first love and learning the truth about the events of three years ago.

With the help of some of your parents' former FBI colleagues and an international task force, you'll dive head first into an investigation that will expose a ruthless syndicate who's reach extends far beyond Ocean City, making new friends along the way and choosing which relationships to nurture into something more. Be careful though, as some choices will make you the arbiter of life and death and some consequences may just be unexpected.

Experience a stirring story and enjoy the companionship of the lovely ladies in your life as you navigate a path towards extricating the Syndicate from your life and the lives of those close to you.

In this choice-based adult visual novel, you will make decisions that will alter your relationships with those around you and guide the story down divergent paths. Along the way, you will unlock bonus images in the image gallery, earn achievements, and encounter animated lewd scenes, unlocking them in the replay gallery.

data.short_description: Three years after tragedy struck twice, your new roommates reignite your desire for life, leading to unexpected revelations about your past and a long overdue reunion with one of your oldest and closest friends. Uncover the truth and choose your path to bring those responsible to justice.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 14 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS 10.10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel or Apple Silicon
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 14 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+ or Kernel 4.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 14 GB 可用空間
